insert.if:
INSERT INTO IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE ( INTRESIDX, MODULE_SRL, MEMBER_SRL, STRRESNAME, STRRESID, STRRESTYPE, STRMODELID, STRGROUPID, STRGROUPID1, STRGROUPID2, STRGROUPID3, STRGROUPID4, STRGROUPID5, STRGROUPID6, STRGROUPID7, STRGROUPID8, STRGROUPID9, STRGROUPID10, STRTAGS, STRPRIORITY, STRRESMEMO, STRCOLID, STRIPVER, STRIPADDR, STRIPV6ADDR, STRSNMPIPADDR, STRSNMPVER, STRSNMPCOMMUNITY, INTSNMPPORT, INTSNMPTIMEOUT, STRSNMPV3_USERNAME, STRSNMPV3_SECURITYLEVEL, STRSNMPV3_AUTHENTICATIONPROTOCOL, STRSNMPV3_AUTHENTICATIONPASSWORD, STRSNMPV3_PRIVACYPROTOCOL, STRSNMPV3_PRIVACYPASSWORD, STRSNMPV3_CONTEXTNAME, STRENABLED_CPU, STRENABLED_MEM, STRENABLED_DISK, STRSNMPMIB_CPU, STRSNMPMIB_MEM, STRSNMPMIB_DISK, STREVENT_CPU, STREVENT_MEM, STREVENT_DISK, STRSTATUSSNMP, STRENABLEDSNMP, DATEUPTIME, STRSTATUSPING, INTINTERVALPING, INTTIMEOUTPING, STRENABLEDPING, INTLOGRAISECOUNT, INTERRRAISECOUNT, STRCPUCURRENT, STRMEMCURRENT, STRDISKCURRENT, STRRTTCURRENT, INTSENSORPID, STRALIVE, STRCONTACTS, DATEPROBEUPDATEDATE, DATELASTUPDATEDATE, DATEREGDATE ) VALUES
( #{item.intresidx}, #{item.moduleSrl}, #{item.memberSrl}, #{item.strresname}, #{item.strresid}, #{item.strrestype}, #{item.strmodelid}, #{item.strgroupid}, #{item.strgroupid1}, #{item.strgroupid2}, #{item.strgroupid3}, #{item.strgroupid4}, #{item.strgroupid5}, #{item.strgroupid6}, #{item.strgroupid7}, #{item.strgroupid8}, #{item.strgroupid9}, #{item.strgroupid10}, #{item.strtags}, #{item.strpriority}, #{item.strresmemo}, #{item.strcolid}, #{item.stripver}, #{item.stripaddr}, #{item.stripv6addr}, #{item.strsnmpipaddr}, #{item.strsnmpver}, #{item.strsnmpcommunity}, #{item.intsnmpport}, #{item.intsnmptimeout}, #{item.strsnmpv3Username}, #{item.strsnmpv3Securitylevel}, #{item.strsnmpv3Authenticationprotocol}, #{item.strsnmpv3Authenticationpassword}, #{item.strsnmpv3Privacyprotocol}, #{item.strsnmpv3Privacypassword}, #{item.strsnmpv3Contextname}, #{item.strenabledCpu}, #{item.strenabledMem}, #{item.strenabledDisk}, #{item.strsnmpmibCpu}, #{item.strsnmpmibMem}, #{item.strsnmpmibDisk}, #{item.streventCpu}, #{item.streventMem}, #{item.streventDisk}, #{item.strstatussnmp}, #{item.strenabledsnmp}, #{item.dateuptime}, #{item.strstatusping}, #{item.intintervalping}, #{item.inttimeoutping}, #{item.strenabledping}, #{item.intlograisecount}, #{item.interrraisecount}, #{item.strcpucurrent}, #{item.strmemcurrent}, #{item.strdiskcurrent}, #{item.strrttcurrent}, #{item.intsensorpid}, #{item.stralive}, #{item.strcontacts}, #{item.dateprobeupdatedate}, #{item.datelastupdatedate}, #{item.dateregdate} )

INSERT INTO IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE_IF ( INTIFIDX, MODULE_SRL, STRRESID, STRIFID, STRIFNAME, STRRESID_A, STRRESID_Z, INTIFINDEX, STRIFDESC, STRIFTYPE, STRIFSPEED, STRIFPHYSADDRESS, STRIFOPERSTATUS, STRIFLIMITBPS, STRIFLIMITBPSC, STRIFLIMITBPSM, STRIFLIMITBPSN, STRIFLIMITBPSW, STRIFERRLEVEL, STRIFIPADDR, STRIFMANPERF, STRIFMANERROR, STRIFCURRENT, STRIFLIMITERR, STRIFMEMO, DATELASTUPDATEDATE, DATEREGDATE ) VALUES
( #{item.intifidx}, #{item.moduleSrl}, #{item.strresid}, #{item.strifid}, #{item.strifname}, #{item.strresidA}, #{item.strresidZ}, #{item.intifindex}, #{item.strifdesc}, #{item.striftype}, #{item.strifspeed}, #{item.strifphysaddress}, #{item.strifoperstatus}, #{item.striflimitbps}::int8 , #{item.striflimitbpsc}::int8, #{item.striflimitbpsm}::int8, #{item.striflimitbpsn}::int8, #{item.striflimitbpsw}::int8, #{item.striferrlevel}, #{item.strifipaddr}, #{item.strifmanperf}, #{item.strifmanerror}, #{item.strifcurrent}, #{item.striflimiterr}, #{item.strifmemo}, #{item.datelastupdatedate}, #{item.dateregdate} )
